name: Hot and Spicy Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt the butter in a medium-size saucepan over low heat.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce, cumin, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper to the melted butter.
4. Cook for 2 - 3 minutes until the seasonings are well combined.
5. Stir in the nuts and spread them evenly on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Toast the almonds for 15 minutes, turning occasionally.
7. Remove from the oven and toss with coarse salt to coat the almonds.
8. Allow the almonds to cool completely before serving.
